campaign.name: BLKOUT Annual Picnic 2026
campaign.tagline: Bring what we need. Come as you are.
soundtrack: Roy Ayers — Everybody Loves the Sunshine
The Blackbyrds — Doing It in the Park

content.title: Launch — Wed 1 Jul
content.content: Bring what we need. Come as you are. — Our annual picnic is back. Sunday 16 August, Regent's Park. Save the date. ☀️

content.title: Our People — Thu 2 Jul
content.content: From the 19-year-old who's never been, to the elder who's been to every one. Every age. Every shade of us.

content.title: Save Your Spot — Fri 3 Jul
content.content: Free to come, always. Pop your name down — we'll send the exact corner of the park nearer the time. 🔗

content.title: The Vibe — Sat 4 Jul
content.content: Not an event. A gathering. The first light of a long summer day.

content.title: Countdown — Sun 5 Jul
content.content: Six Sundays till the park. 🌞

content.title: Music Monday — Mon 6 Jul
content.content: 🎵 Roy Ayers, Everybody Loves the Sunshine. "My life in the sunshine." The whole brief, in one song.
content.track: Roy Ayers — Everybody Loves the Sunshine

content.title: Picnics Past — Tue 7 Jul
content.content: 2019. Same grass, same us. 📸

content.title: The Invitation — Wed 8 Jul
content.content: No stage, no line-up, no tickets — just us, in the sun.

content.title: Our People — Thu 9 Jul
content.content: The kite-fliers, the watchers, the one who brought too much food. Bring who you are.

content.title: Save Your Spot — Fri 10 Jul
content.content: A name on the list = the location lands in your inbox closer to the day. 🔗

content.title: The Vibe — Sat 11 Jul
content.content: 🎵 The Blackbyrds, Doing It in the Park. Midday, peak summer, nowhere to be but here.
content.track: The Blackbyrds — Doing It in the Park

content.title: Countdown — Sun 12 Jul
content.content: Five Sundays till the park.

content.title: Music Monday — Mon 13 Jul
content.content: 🎵 The Blackbyrds, Doing It in the Park. Because that's literally the plan.
content.track: The Blackbyrds — Doing It in the Park

content.title: Picnics Past — Tue 14 Jul
content.content: 2020 — the summer we needed each other most. 📸

content.title: The Invitation — Wed 15 Jul
content.content: Nothing to perform; nowhere to be but here.

content.title: Our People — Thu 16 Jul
content.content: The faces that come back every year — and the new ones we can't wait to meet.

content.title: Save Your Spot — Fri 17 Jul
content.content: Tell us you're coming — it helps us bring enough for everyone. 🔗

content.title: The Vibe — Sat 18 Jul
content.content: 🎵 Incognito, London Town. Golden hour. A London thing, a Black thing, a love thing.

content.title: Countdown — Sun 19 Jul
content.content: Four Sundays till the park.

content_calendar.phase: Week 4 · 20–26 Jul — All of us, every age (Golden) + the sponsor reveal

content.title: Music Monday — Mon 20 Jul
content.content: 🎵 Incognito, London Town — Bluey & co. The sound of Black London in the sun.

content.title: Picnics Past — Tue 21 Jul
content.content: 2021. Look how we hold each other. 📸

content.title: The Invitation — Wed 22 Jul
content.content: Come as you are. Bring your cousin, your ex, your situationship, your mum.

content.title: Our People — Thu 23 Jul
content.content: Skating runs this country. One of the crews we'd love to see roll in — got skates? Bring them. (Inspiration: @laronbest, LA skate icon — credit/tag, not attending.)

content.title: Save Your Spot — Fri 24 Jul
content.content: Free, always. Add your name — exact spot + timings to follow. 🔗

content.title: The Vibe — Sat 25 Jul
content.content: The hour the light goes gold and nobody wants to leave.

content.title: Sponsor reveal + Countdown — Sun 26 Jul
content.content: This year's sponsors: us. No brands. No logos. The community funds its own joy — chip in if you can, the rest goes to LGBT+ Rights Ghana. 🪣 Three Sundays till the park.

content.title: Music Monday — Mon 27 Jul
content.content: 🎵 Soul II Soul, Keep On Movin'. "A happy face, a thumping bass." Keep on.
content.track: Soul II Soul — Keep On Movin'

content.title: Picnics Past — Tue 28 Jul
content.content: 2022. The year of the 31 July sunshine. 📸

content.title: The Invitation — Wed 29 Jul
content.content: Bring what we need. A blanket. A plate to share. Yourself.

content.title: Our People — Thu 30 Jul
content.content: When the speaker comes out on the trolley, you know. 🔊

content.title: Save Your Spot — Fri 31 Jul
content.content: Two and a bit weeks. Save your spot — and we'll tell you exactly where to find us. 🔗

content.title: The Vibe — Sat 1 Aug
content.content: Just us, in the sun — and then the string lights come on.

content.title: Countdown — Sun 2 Aug
content.content: Two Sundays till the park.

content_calendar.phase: Week 6 · 3–9 Aug — The cause & the after-party (Dusk → Night)

content.title: Music Monday — Mon 3 Aug
content.content: 🎵 Omar, There's Nothing Like This. British soul, golden and grown.

content.title: Picnics Past — Tue 4 Aug
content.content: 2023. Still here. Still ours. 📸

content.title: The cause — Wed 5 Aug
content.content: Why the bucket? It's been a brutal year for our family in Ghana. We give together — to LGBT+ Rights Ghana, a partner we love.

content.title: Our People — Thu 6 Aug
content.content: Loud table. Louder laugh. Bring your domino face.

content.title: Save Your Spot — Fri 7 Aug
content.content: Last clear week to sign up. Exact location drops to your inbox soon. 🔗

content.title: After-party reveal — Sat 8 Aug
content.content: And when the sun goes down… 🎤 karaoke after-party at Zodiac Bar (Trans-founded, ours for the night). (pending confirmation)

content.title: Countdown — Sun 9 Aug
content.content: Next Sunday. ☀️

content_calendar.phase: Week 7 · 10–16 Aug — The day arrives (Night → daybreak)

content.title: Music Monday — Mon 10 Aug
content.content: 🎵 Maze ft. Frankie Beverly, Before I Let Go. The cookout anthem. You know what week it is.
content.track: Maze ft. Frankie Beverly — Before I Let Go

content.title: Picnics Past — Tue 11 Aug
content.content: Every year, one frame. Here's the reel of us. 📸

content.title: The Invitation — Wed 12 Aug
content.content: Not an event. A gathering. This Sunday. Regent's Park.

content.title: Practical — Thu 13 Aug
content.content: What to bring: a blanket, a plate to share, sun cream, your people. We've got backup food + the speaker.

content.title: Location + weather — Fri 14 Aug
content.content: 📍 Checking your inbox today: the exact corner of Regent's Park + the weather word. Not signed up? Last chance. 🔗

content.title: Eve — Sat 15 Aug
content.content: Tomorrow. One day, all its light. Bring what we need. Come as you are.

content.title: THE DAY — Sun 16 Aug
content.content: Today. Regent's Park, 1–7.30pm. Then karaoke at Zodiac. Come and be among your people. ☀️

key_dates.note: Exact location + weather word to sign-ups
THE DAY — Regent's Park 1–7.30pm + Zodiac after-party

success_metrics.fundraising: chip-in surplus + bucket → LGBT+ Rights Ghana
success_metrics.reach: reel plays on the three soundtrack posts
